mechanism: Cost attributed per application through Microsoft Customer Agreement Invoice Sections. All landing zone subscriptions under one application share a single billing scope.
why: Without billing isolation, cost ownership relies on tag accuracy — tags drift and require active governance.

related.note: Profile registration creates the invoice section.
No shared services — cost has a single owner.
Consumption services ensure costs are proportional to actual use.
Forecast alerts notify the owning team before budget is exceeded.

violations: Subscription under platform invoice section instead of application's.
Shared service consumed by multiple landing zones without cost isolation.
Tags as primary cost attribution instead of invoice section isolation.
